weekly picks (Jul 2 week 2026)

Posted on July 13, 2026 in 2026jul,  Daily t.me,  adsabs,  g scholar

A WordCloud of 2026 July 1st week collection

===This week’s pick===

  • Score :
Unfold/Fold

07/14

  1. s41567-026-03387-0 Magnetic field maybe (Nature Physics)

  2. s41567-026-03373-6 Emergence of phase coherence in a magnon Bose–Einstein condensate (Nature Physics)

  3. s42005-026-02746-w Nonlinear tripartite coupling of trapped electrons with magnons in a hybrid quantum system (Communications Physics)

  4. s41563-026-02698-0 Author Correction: Plasmonic printing of high-performance metal oxide electronics under room temperature (Nature Materials)

  5. s41598-026-61044-1 Composition-engineered Sr1−xBaxTiO3 for high-efficiency dielectric resonator antennas in 5G/6G bands (Scientific Reports)

  6. s41598-026-61106-4 Investigation of the effect of individual and combined weathering factors on mechanical properties and degradation of PLA FFF 3D prints (Scientific Reports)

  7. p4s9-9smn Connecting Magic Dynamics in Thermofield Double States to Spectral Form Factors (PRL)

  8. wd91-v58h Planckian Bound on Quantum Dynamical Entropy (PRL)

  9. 3pqk-qr64 Edge of Safety: Charge-Charge Correlation in the Back-to-Back Limit (PRL)

  10. gcpg-wf17 Symmetric Localization of ${ν}_{tot}=4/3$ Fractional Topological Insulator Edges (PRL)

  11. ntfh-mk9d Hidden Density-Wave Instability in the Trimer Ruthenate ${\mathrm{Ba}}{4}{\mathrm{Ru}}{3}{\mathrm{O}}_{10}$ (PRL)

  12. 7hjs-rx8d Pushy Random Walk: A Minimal Model for Transport in Deformable Media (PRL)

  13. rj4r-2vrf Direct Observation of Energy Transport Dynamics and High Thermal Conductance across Single Solid-Molecule Junctions (PRL)

  14. 9n96-whkp Reptation and Beyond: Neutron Spin Echo Experiments Verify the Fundamental Predictions of the Cooperative-Dynamics Generalized Langevin Equation Theory (PRL)

  15. rj2s-tfnc Odd Elasticity in Disordered Chiral Active Materials (PRL)

  16. r8v1-5xwf Quantum advantage bounds for a multipartite Gaussian battery (PRR)

  17. r36b-vw82 Multiphoton ionization with three-dimensional light fields (PRR)

  18. 6jdh-pm39 Coherent errors in a superconducting six-qubit network with beyond-nearest-neighbor connectivity (PRR)

  19. q96k-2pcs Anisotropic interactions induce dynamical spin freezing in artificial colloidal ice (PRR)

  20. ftks-31jr Anomalous pressure dependence of the bulk modulus and Yb valence in cubic YbPd (PRR)

  21. dvz5-x9s9 Unraveling proton spin polarization through hypertriton production in heavy-ion collisions (PRR)

  22. cvqr-4wkd Moiré-resonant surface state in ultrathin ${\mathrm{RuO}}_{2}(110)$ (PRR)

  23. 2607.08787v1 Brownian Bridge for Coherent State Path Integral Monte Carlo (arXiv)

  24. 2607.08822v1 Energetics of fractional anomalous Hall crystals in rhombohedral graphene (arXiv)

  25. 2607.08825v1 Quantum Oscillation Signatures of $\mathbb{Z}_2$ Monopole Charge in Nodal-Ring Semimetals (arXiv)

  26. 2607.08826v1 The monopole plasma resonance: a smoking gun of 3D $U(1)$ quantum spin liquids (arXiv)

  27. 2607.08827v1 Exact Lindbladian Dynamics from Conformal Embeddings and Topological Defects in Conformal Field Theory (arXiv)

  28. 2607.08829v1 Magnetic Field Control of the N'eel Vector and Magnon Visibility in Altermagnetic MnTe (arXiv)

  29. 2607.08840v1 Fermion-mediated Casimir effect on mesoscopic rings implementing non-Clifford SWAP$^{\alpha}$ gates (arXiv)

  30. 2607.08845v1 Probing Cooper pair momentum by quasiparticle steering with planar Josephson junctions (arXiv)

  31. 2607.08851v1 A strong-coupling theory for polarizable symmetrically charged walls with counterions only (arXiv)

  32. 2607.08860v1 Ferroelastic instability in rutile TiO2 and thermodynamic suppression of the CaCl2-type phase (arXiv)

  38. 2607.08992v1 Vacancy Effect on the Ground-State Energy of a Bose Gas Trapped by 1D Imperfect Artificial Crystal (arXiv)
